name: Alight, Inc.
lede: Alight runs four centers across four Indian cities. Kochi, Chennai, Gurugram and Noida, covering SSC and GCC/GIC.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Alight office in India. We map four, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Alight, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Alight runs 4 verified centers across 4 Indian cities (Kochi, Chennai, Gurugram, Noida), covering SSC and GCC/GIC. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Alight's India footprint covers Kochi, Chennai, Gurugram and Noida, spanning SSC and GCC/GIC. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all two decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Alight operate in India?
faq.a: Alight operates 4 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Alight have centers in?
faq.a: Alight's India footprint includes Kochi and 3 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Alight run in India?
faq.a: Alight runs SSC and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Alight's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Alight's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Alight's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Alight's India centers, across HR. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
